homepage.heroSubline: Supreme Sliding Door Repair delivers durable, energy-efficient window solutions. Protect your home from the elements with our expert installations.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Craftsmanship, Rooted in Long Beach
aboutText: Supreme Sliding Door Repair began over a decade ago with a simple goal: to provide Long Beach residents with exceptional window replacement services they could rely on. Founded by a local carpenter, we understood the unique challenges our coastal climate presents.

We believe in doing things right the first time. Our approach combines time-tested techniques with modern materials to ensure lasting performance. We prioritize clear communication, meticulous attention to detail, and respect for your property.

Long Beach is our home, and we're committed to giving back. We actively support local community initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact through responsible disposal and energy-efficient product choices.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand Long Beach's unique climate and housing styles.

valueProps.title: Durable Solutions
valueProps.description: Protect your home from sun, wind, and potential seismic activity.

valueProps.title: Energy Efficiency
valueProps.description: Reduce energy bills with advanced window technology.

valueProps.title: Expert Installation
valueProps.description: Precise installation ensures optimal performance and longevity.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free, no-obligation quote and discover the difference quality windows can make.

services.name: Window Replacement
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your home with energy-efficient, durable window replacements.
services.description:
Supreme Sliding Door Repair provides comprehensive window replacement services for Long Beach homes. We handle every step of the process, from initial consultation and precise measurements to expert installation and meticulous cleanup. We understand the challenges of Long Beach's climate – intense sun, potential Santa Ana winds, and the ever-present threat of earthquakes. That's why we offer a wide selection of window styles and materials designed to withstand the elements and enhance your home's energy efficiency. 

Choose from vinyl, wood, fiberglass, and aluminum frames, along with various glass options, including dual-pane, low-E, and impact-resistant glass. Our team will guide you through the selection process, considering your budget, aesthetic preferences, and performance requirements. We work with leading manufacturers to ensure you receive the highest quality products backed by solid warranties.

Whether you're looking to replace a single broken window or upgrade all the windows in your home, we have the expertise and resources to get the job done right. We pride ourselves on our attention to detail, ensuring a perfect fit and seamless integration with your existing architecture. Protect your home and enhance its value with our professional window replacement services.

faq.question: How long does window replacement take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the number of windows and the complexity of the installation. We'll provide a timeline during the consultation.

faq.question: What types of windows do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide variety of window styles, including single-hung, double-hung, casement, awning, sliding, and picture windows, in various materials.

faq.question: Are your windows energy efficient?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer energy-efficient windows with features like dual-pane glass, low-E coatings, and argon gas fills to reduce heat transfer and lower energy bills.

services.name: Window Repair
services.shortDescription: Restore your windows to their optimal condition with our expert repair services.
services.description:
Don't replace your windows if they can be repaired! Supreme Sliding Door Repair offers comprehensive window repair services to address a wide range of issues, saving you money and extending the life of your existing windows. From broken glass and damaged frames to faulty hardware and air leaks, our skilled technicians can diagnose and resolve the problem efficiently. We understand the importance of preserving the original character of Long Beach's diverse housing stock, from historic Craftsman bungalows to mid-century modern homes. 

We specialize in repairing all types of windows, including wood, vinyl, aluminum, and fiberglass. Our services include glass replacement, frame repair, sash repair, hardware replacement (locks, handles, cranks), weather stripping replacement, and caulking. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs that blend seamlessly with your existing windows.

Addressing window problems promptly can prevent further damage and improve your home's energy efficiency. Don't let a small issue turn into a costly replacement. Contact Supreme Sliding Door Repair for a reliable and affordable window repair solution.

faq.question: What types of window repairs do you handle?
faq.answer: We handle a wide range of repairs, including broken glass, damaged frames, faulty hardware, air leaks, and condensation issues.

faq.question: How do I know if my windows need repair or replacement?
faq.answer: If your windows are drafty, difficult to open or close, have broken glass or damaged frames, or are showing signs of condensation between the panes, it's time to consider repair or replacement.

faq.question: Can you repair wood windows?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in repairing wood windows, including sash repair, frame repair, and glazing replacement.

services.name: Window Sealing
services.shortDescription: Prevent drafts and lower energy bills with our professional window sealing services.
services.description:
Stop throwing money out the window! Air leaks around your windows can significantly increase your energy bills and make your home uncomfortable. Supreme Sliding Door Repair offers professional window sealing services to eliminate drafts and improve your home's energy efficiency. We use high-quality weather stripping and caulking to create an airtight seal around your windows, preventing air infiltration and heat loss. 

Our experienced technicians will carefully inspect your windows to identify all potential air leaks. We'll then apply the appropriate sealing materials, ensuring a tight and durable seal. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring that the sealing is not only effective but also aesthetically pleasing. We understand the importance of maintaining the architectural integrity of Long Beach homes, and we strive to provide sealing solutions that blend seamlessly with your existing windows.

Window sealing is a cost-effective way to improve your home's comfort and lower your energy bills. Contact Supreme Sliding Door Repair today for a free estimate and start saving money!
process: Step 1: Window Inspection and Leak Detection

faq.question: How can I tell if my windows need sealing?
faq.answer: If you feel drafts around your windows, notice condensation on the glass, or experience high energy bills, your windows may need sealing.

faq.question: What types of sealing materials do you use?
faq.answer: We use high-quality weather stripping and caulking that are designed to withstand the elements and provide a durable seal.

faq.question: How long does window sealing last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of window sealing depends on the quality of the materials used and the environmental conditions. With proper installation and maintenance, our sealing can last for several years.

services.name: Glass Replacement
services.shortDescription: Replace cracked, broken, or fogged glass with our expert glass replacement services.
services.description:
Cracked, broken, or fogged glass not only detracts from your home's appearance but also compromises its energy efficiency and security. Supreme Sliding Door Repair offers professional glass replacement services to restore your windows to their optimal condition. We handle all types of glass, including single-pane, double-pane, tempered, laminated, and decorative glass. We understand the unique challenges of replacing glass in older Long Beach homes, and we have the expertise to handle even the most complex projects.

Our experienced technicians will carefully remove the damaged glass and replace it with a new, high-quality pane. We'll ensure a perfect fit and a watertight seal to prevent air leaks and water damage. We offer a wide selection of glass options, including energy-efficient glass, noise-reducing glass, and privacy glass. We can also match the existing glass in your windows to maintain the original aesthetic of your home.

Don't live with unsightly or damaged glass. Contact Supreme Sliding Door Repair today for a free estimate and let us restore your windows to their former glory.
process: Step 2: Safe Removal of Damaged Glass

faq.question: What types of glass do you replace?
faq.answer: We replace all types of glass, including single-pane, double-pane, tempered, laminated, and decorative glass.

faq.question: Can you match the existing glass in my windows?
faq.answer: Yes, we can match the existing glass in your windows to maintain the original aesthetic of your home.

faq.question: How long does glass replacement take?
faq.answer: Glass replacement typically takes a few hours, depending on the size and complexity of the project.

services.name: Window Hardware Repair
services.shortDescription: Repair or replace damaged window hardware for smooth operation and security.
services.description:
Sticky windows, broken locks, or damaged cranks can make your windows difficult to operate and compromise your home's security. Supreme Sliding Door Repair offers professional window hardware repair services to restore your windows to their optimal function. We repair or replace all types of window hardware, including locks, handles, cranks, hinges, and balances. We understand the importance of maintaining the original hardware in older Long Beach homes, and we strive to provide repair solutions that preserve the character of your windows.

Our experienced technicians will diagnose the problem and recommend the appropriate repair or replacement solution. We use high-quality replacement parts that are designed to last. We can also lubricate and adjust your window hardware to ensure smooth and efficient operation.

Don't struggle with faulty window hardware. Contact Supreme Sliding Door Repair today for a free estimate and let us restore your windows to perfect working order.

faq.question: What types of window hardware do you repair?
faq.answer: We repair all types of window hardware, including locks, handles, cranks, hinges, and balances.

faq.question: Can you match the existing hardware in my windows?
faq.answer: Yes, we can often match the existing hardware in your windows to maintain the original aesthetic of your home.

faq.question: How long does hardware repair take?
faq.answer: Hardware repair typically takes a few hours, depending on the complexity of the project.

services.name: New Construction Window Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert window installation for new homes and additions.
services.description:
Building a new home in Long Beach, or adding an addition? Supreme Sliding Door Repair provides professional window installation services for new construction projects. We work closely with builders and homeowners to ensure that your windows are installed correctly and efficiently. We understand the importance of proper window installation for energy efficiency, weather resistance, and structural integrity. 

We offer a wide selection of window styles and materials to suit your architectural design and budget. Our experienced technicians will carefully install your windows according to manufacturer specifications and local building codes. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring a perfect fit and a watertight seal. We also offer window sealing and weather stripping services to maximize energy efficiency.

Trust Supreme Sliding Door Repair to provide expert window installation for your new construction project.
process: Step 1: Project Consultation and Window Selection

faq.question: Do you work with builders and homeowners?
faq.answer: Yes, we work with both builders and homeowners on new construction projects.

faq.question: Are you familiar with local building codes?
faq.answer: Yes, we are familiar with all local building codes and regulations related to window installation.

faq.question: What types of windows do you install in new construction?
faq.answer: We install all types of windows in new construction, including vinyl, wood, aluminum, and fiberglass windows.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Supreme Sliding Door Repair did an outstanding job replacing all the windows in my Belmont Shore bungalow. The team was professional, efficient, and incredibly respectful of my home. I immediately noticed a difference in the temperature inside, and my energy bills have already gone down. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: I had a broken window pane after some landscaping gone wrong. Supreme Sliding Door Repair came out quickly and replaced the glass. The technician was friendly and the price was very reasonable. Would definitely call them again.

reviews.name: Linda P.
reviews.text: Living near the coast, the Santa Ana winds can really make a difference in my home's heating bill. I hired Supreme Sliding Door Repair to seal all my windows. The difference has been amazing! No more drafts, and my house stays warm without cranking up the thermostat. Thank you!

reviews.name: Robert M.
reviews.text: Supreme Sliding Door Repair replaced a fogged-up window in my condo. They were on time, courteous, and did a fantastic job. The new glass looks crystal clear, and the price was very competitive.

reviews.name: Susan L.
reviews.text: I had a couple windows that were hard to open and close. The technician from Supreme Sliding Door Repair fixed the hardware and now they work like new! Great service at a fair price.

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: From start to finish, Supreme Sliding Door Repair were professional. The installation crew was efficient and cleaned up everything. The new windows look so much better and are helping keep the house cooler.

serviceAreas.content:
Supreme Sliding Door Repair is proud to offer our window and sliding door expertise to the vibrant city of Los Angeles. From the iconic architecture of Hollywood to the diverse neighborhoods throughout the city, we understand the unique needs of Los Angeles homeowners. We specialize in window replacement and repair for the city's diverse range of homes, from modern condos to historic houses. 

Los Angeles homes often feature 1920s Spanish Colonial Revival architecture, requiring careful attention to detail when replacing windows. We offer a wide selection of window styles that complement the city's architectural character, ensuring your new windows enhance your home's beauty and value. We are committed to providing Los Angeles residents with top-quality window solutions that enhance their homes and improve energy efficiency.
serviceAreas.localContext: Los Angeles features a warm, dry climate year-round, making energy-efficient windows a smart investment for homeowners.
